records.ety: [NL., from trapezium + Gr. <?/ seat, base, fr. <?/ to sit.]

defs: A solid bounded by twenty-four equal and similar trapeziums; a tetragonal trisoctahedron. See the Note under Trisoctahedron.
A tetartohedral solid of the hexagonal system, bounded by six trapezoidal planes. The faces of this form are common on quartz crystals.
